metadata.description: Synthetic health monitoring dataset: 1-hour window with a fault at T+35 that cascades across services and resolves at T+55.

fault_window.description: sample-health-service degrades at T+35; cascades to sample-health-function (+2 min) and sample-health-subscription (+3 min). All recover by T+55.

policies.name: Self-Monitoring Policy
policies.description: Health checks for the health-engine service itself
